tagline: We Don't Just Build Pools. We Build Memories.

hero.headline: Chester County's Pool Experts Since 1963
hero.subheadline: Three generations of families have trusted Gritz Pools & Spas to build, maintain, and care for their backyard oasis. From custom pool construction to our fully stocked retail store, we're the only pool partner you'll ever need.
checkmarks: Full-service: construction, maintenance, retail & hot tubs
Financing options available for new pool builds

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs, Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the first shovel of dirt to decades of crystal-clear water, Gritz Pools handles it all so you can just enjoy the swim.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Vinyl liner and fiberglass inground pools designed around your backyard, your budget, and your family's lifestyle. Financing available.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal prep and winterization done right so your pool is protected year-round and ready to splash into every spring.

cards.title: Liner Replacement & Repair
cards.description: Fading, wrinkles, or leaks? Our crew restores your pool's look and integrity with expert liner replacement services.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Service
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — our Hayward-authorized technicians diagnose and fix it fast so your pool stays running.

cards.title: Hot Tub Sales & Service
cards.description: Authorized Nordic and Aspen Spas dealer. Browse our showroom, choose your perfect hot tub, and let us handle delivery and setup.

cards.title: Pool Supply Retail Store
cards.description: Chemicals, covers, accessories, outdoor furniture, and free professional water testing. Stop by — we've got everything you need.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool Project in 3 Simple Steps

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Call or visit our showroom. Whether it's a new pool, a repair, or just chemicals, we'll listen and give you honest guidance.

steps.title: We Handle the Details
steps.description: Our experienced crew takes care of everything — permits, scheduling, installation, and quality checks — so you don't have to.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Dive in and make memories. And when you need us for maintenance, supplies, or upgrades, we're always just a phone call away.

about.label: About Gritz Pools & Spas
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Trust — For Over 60 Years
about.description: Since 1963, the Gritz family has been Chester County's go-to pool and spa experts. What started as a small local operation has grown into a full-service destination — pool construction, maintenance, hot tub sales, and a retail store stocked with everything pool owners need. We've built pools for grandparents, their children, and now their grandchildren. That kind of loyalty isn't bought — it's earned through decades of honest work, fair pricing, and standing behind every job we do.

features.title: Multi-Generational Trust
features.description: Many of our customers have been with us for 30, 40, even 50 years. We build relationships, not just pools.

features.title: Full-Service, One Stop
features.description: Construction, maintenance, repairs, hot tubs, and a retail store — no need to call anyone else.

features.title: Deep Local Roots
features.description: We live and work in Chester County. This community isn't just our market — it's our home.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool, spa, and service job is different. We'll give you an honest quote upfront — no hidden fees, no pressure. Financing options available for new construction.

guarantee.headline: The Gritz Family Promise
guarantee.description: For over 60 years, our name has been on every pool we build and every repair we make. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it — that's not a policy, it's how the Gritz family has always done business. Your satisfaction is our reputation.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool installations take 4 to 8 weeks depending on the design, permits, and weather. We'll walk you through the timeline during your free consultation so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer financing options to help make your dream pool a reality. Ask us about current rates and terms when you schedule your consultation.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Chester County, Berks County, West Chester, Oxford, Reading, Lancaster, and surrounding communities across southeastern Pennsylvania.

faqs.question: Do I need to schedule pool opening and closing, or can I walk in?
faqs.answer: We recommend scheduling your seasonal opening and closing early, especially in spring when demand is highest. Call us or stop by the store to get on the schedule.

faqs.question: Can you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service, repair, and maintain all inground pools regardless of who built them. We also offer free water testing at our retail store for any pool owner.

testimonials.name: Kay R.
testimonials.text: We put a Gritz pool in, in 1976. It was the best investment we ever made! They have handled our maintenance, chemicals, filter replacements, and liner replacements over the years.

testimonials.name: Joe S.
testimonials.text: An amazing company — trusting, honest, and friendly. The customer service is spot on. I would highly recommend Gritz Pools to anyone looking for quality pool services.

testimonials.name: Stephen M.
testimonials.text: As a contractor myself, I really appreciated their no-nonsense approach to pool construction. Professional, efficient, and the finished product speaks for itself.

contact.headline: Ready to Start Your Pool Project?
contact.subtitle: Whether you're building your first pool, need a repair, or just want to browse our retail store — the Gritz family is here to help.
benefits: Free consultations and honest quotes — no pressure
Showroom and retail store open for walk-ins
